It includes a playful shot of them confidently seated on a dark wooden table in a restaurant or cafe, observing their surroundings with curious eyes, amidst table essentials like glasses and a small plant. It also features a heartwarming image of our little one happily snuggled on their dad's lap, both sharing a loving moment during our meal. These photos truly highlight the joy and intimacy of our family outings.

events.name: Family Meal at the Chinese Restaurant
events.description: This event captures a delightful moment with our little one during a family meal at a Chinese restaurant. The photo shows our child with beautiful curly hair and bright blue eyes, smiling sweetly at the camera. The restaurant setting is vibrant, with traditional red Chinese decorations like framed art and 'good fortune' characters adorning the walls, and a warm orange tiled floor. It highlights the joy and coziness of our outings together.

events.name: Our Little One's New Sparkly Shoes
events.description: This event captures the excitement of our little one trying on or wearing their new bright pink Skechers shoes. The shoes are adorned with glittery pink and purple straps and sparkling rhinestones on the toes, showcasing a vibrant and playful style. The photo, taken indoors on a carpeted floor, highlights the joy and charm of these new, dazzling shoes.

events.name: Casual Diner Meal
events.description: This event captures a casual dining experience at a restaurant with a distinctive, rustic atmosphere. The interior features tables adorned with classic red and white checkered tablecloths and dark wooden chairs. There's also a dark, well-worn booth seating area, contributing to the establishment's character. A glimpse of a cow decoration in the background suggests a possible country or farm-themed decor, indicating a relaxed and authentic spot for a meal.

events.name: Everyday Fun with Our Little One at Home
events.description: This event captures a collection of heartwarming and candid moments with our little one at home on the same day. It begins with them exploring healthy foods in the kitchen, eagerly interacting with a red bell pepper, showing their adventurous spirit with food. It then transitions to a playful moment, capturing their joyful and charming smile in what appears to be their room. These images together highlight the precious everyday discoveries and happy moments of our toddler in their home environment.

events.name: Curious Print: Floyd Tries to Go On Line
events.description: This event captures a captivating black and white print titled 'Floyd Tries to Go On Line.' The image shows a smiling man, Floyd, in a hat and jacket, playfully engaging with a wooden utility pole amidst a vast, open landscape of grassy hills. The scene evokes a sense of timelessness and humor, highlighting a simpler, perhaps more disconnected era or place. This print suggests an appreciation for intriguing or vintage photography.

events.name: Freshly Gathered Eggs
events.description: This event captures the simple satisfaction of collecting freshly laid eggs. The image displays a nest full of various eggs, primarily brown with a few white ones, nestled comfortably in a bed of straw. It reflects a moment of rural charm, perhaps from a farm visit or a personal backyard coop, highlighting the natural beauty and bounty of everyday life.

events.name: My Fun Dog-Patterned Fabric
events.description: This event highlights a personal detail: a vibrant fabric adorned with an array of charming dog breeds. The image captures a close-up of the playful pattern, showcasing various pups from fluffy terriers to spotted Dalmatians, reflecting a personal interest in quirky designs and a fondness for dogs. It's a small snapshot of everyday style or a creative project, conveying a sense of joy and individuality.

events.name: My Baby's Changing Expressions
events.description: This event captures the delightful and sometimes challenging reality of parenting, featuring two contrasting moments of my baby. One image shows the baby in a crying state, highlighting the common emotional moments of infancy. The other image beautifully counteracts this with a close-up of the baby smiling, revealing emerging teeth and an overall joyful expression, with a subtle glimpse of myself. It's a testament to the rapid shifts in a baby's mood and the preciousness of both their happy and more challenging moments.

events.name: Our Free-Roaming Chickens
events.description: This event captures a serene moment observing our chickens in their natural environment. The image shows several reddish-brown chickens freely roaming and pecking in the yard, seen from the perspective of inside a window. It reflects the simple pleasure and tranquility of watching our lively farm birds going about their day.

events.name: Outdoor Fun with My Kids
events.description: This event captures heartwarming moments of my children enjoying the outdoors in our yard. It features my two kids, one a baby and the other older, sitting comfortably in their small camping chairs. The baby looks especially adorable in a knitted sweater and embroidered pants while sitting in a bright pink chair, observing the surroundings. The natural setting of our home, with our chickens visible in the background, highlights the relaxed, rural atmosphere of our backyard as they soak in the fresh air.

events.name: Precious Moments with My Little One
events.description: This event captures intimate and heartwarming moments with my baby, documenting their growth and everyday joy. It includes a sweet close-up portrait of my little one, smiling and showing off their first two teeth, highlighting their bright expression and our connection. We also captured playful scenes of them enjoying a muffin in their high chair, creating a delightful mess that perfectly captures the charm and adorable chaos of their early mealtime adventures. There's also an adorable shot of them standing, looking so curious in their lovely patchwork dress, showcasing their developing person

events.name: Skyward Serenity
events.description: This event captures breathtaking moments of nature's beauty and vastness. It features a striking photograph of a large bird, possibly a hawk or an eagle, silhouetted majestically against a bright, cloudy sky. The sun peeks through the clouds, creating a radiant backdrop that emphasizes the bird's graceful flight. This image reflects a moment of natural wonder and the serene beauty of the open skies.

events.name: A Serene Encounter with Nature
events.description: This event captures a beautiful moment of peace in nature. It features an adorable, fluffy rabbit with white and light brown fur, sitting calmly on vibrant green grass. The setting appears to be a rural or semi-rural outdoor area, with a wire fence and an open field visible in the background, along with distant trees. The image conveys a sense of tranquility and the simple beauty of observing wildlife in its natural habitat.

events.name: Outdoor Playtime Fun with My Little One
events.description: This event captures a delightful outdoor moment of my little one enjoying playtime. The image shows my baby happily sitting in a white laundry basket, being pulled across vibrant green grass under the sunshine. My little one is looking directly at the camera with an adorable expression, wearing a striped top, clearly relishing the fun ride. A toy car is also visible in the background, setting a playful and joyful atmosphere.

suggestedQs.question: While I was walking around Kunming, I came across a shop called Yipinxuan — what was hanging on the bamboo poles outside the entrance?
suggestedQs.explanation: Visual analysis of a photo from January 3, 2007, and a corresponding caption both describe a long line of large, flattened dried fish hanging outside a shop in Kunming.

trace.query: Yipinxuan shop Kunming bamboo poles hanging
trace.snippet:
[Visual analysis of 5 photo(s)]
Based on the first photo (2007-01-03), what was hanging on the bamboo pole outside the entrance was a long line of large, flattened dried fish.

Specifically:
*   There were approximately 10-12 distinct pieces of **large, flattened dried fish** suspended from a single light-colored, horizontal wooden pole (consistent with a bamboo pole).
*   The fish varied in size and shape; some appeared to be entire large fish, while others looked like sections.
*   Their colors were primarily dark brown and reddish-brown, with some darker, almost blackish edges, and lighter tan-brown areas. Some pieces showed hints of reddish-orange in their visible flesh.
*   Each fish was suspended by simple, light-colored ropes tied around the pole.

The prominent 'TURKISH' signage below, along with the partially visible 'CAFE' text, confirms the cultural theme and adds to the inviting charm of this space. It's wonderful to see such detailed artistry in an everyday setting.
(score=0.37) 2008-03-08 [Outdoor Festival & Market]: I remember this lively scene from what feels like an outdoor festival, perhaps part of the same vibrant day as the market. There's a white tent set up as a stage, and I can clearly see a band performing under the sign 'FIDDLERS GREEN', with instruments like a guitar and what looks like a fiddle. A crowd of people is gathered around, some sitting casually on the grassy area, others standing and enjoying the music. It really captures the relaxed and communal atmosphere of the event, with everyone enjoying the performance and the pleasant outdoor setting. It was lovely to experience the local culture and entertainment during this outing.
(score=0.36) 2011-09-14 [A Little One's First Piano Exploration]: I absolutely love this capture of a little one exploring the piano! With their adorable curly hair and a pacifier, they're sitting so intently, their tiny hands reaching out to touch the keys of the dark upright piano. They're wearing a cozy light-colored hoodie and what looks like a string of beads around their neck, making this moment even sweeter. It looks like they're just starting to discover the magic of music, and it's such a pure, curious scene. This photo brings back such warm memories of their early days of discovery.
(score=0.32) 2011-10-14 [Discovering Asian Art and Culture]: I remember capturing this beautiful piece of art, featuring two stylized fish, likely koi, depicted in a lovely shade of red or pink. They're gracefully arcing, almost mirroring each other, creating a sense of balance and subtle movement against a light, textured background. The delicate calligraphy in the upper left corner really adds to the authentic East Asian aesthetic of the piece. It could have been part of a screen or a decorative panel, and I was really drawn to its simplicity and elegance, finding it to be a very peaceful and captivating image among the various cultural artifacts I was appreciating that day.
(score=0.32) 2007-01-03 [Exploring Chinese Local Life and Street Scenes]: I remember being fascinated by this street scene, where a long line of large, flattened dried fish hung from a wooden pole, suspended by simple ropes. It was such a unique sight, clearly a traditional way of preserving food and a common display in local markets or shops. The fish varied in size and shape, some appearing to be entire large fish, others just parts, all contributing to a very rustic and authentic atmosphere. In the background, there was a building with an open doorway, and a dark banner with Chinese characters, hinting at a shop or eatery. The bright sunlight illuminated the scene, making the textures and colors of the fish stand out. It felt like a true glimpse into the local life and culinary practices of the area.
(score=0.31) 2011-02-11 [Lunar New Year Festivities]: I captured our Yusheng dish after we had finished the lively Lo Hei toss! All the vibrant shredded ingredients, the raw fish, and the crispy bits are now wonderfully mixed together on the large white plate, signifying all the good wishes and prosperity we've shared. The red tablecloth underneath continues to set the festive tone, and you can see a few empty smaller plates around, ready for us to dig in or perhaps having already been used. It's a beautiful sight that encapsulates the joy and communal spirit of our Lunar New Year celebration, reflecting all the fortune we wished for while tossing!
(score=0.31) 2011-02-11 [Lunar New Year Festivities]: I love how this photo perfectly captures the dynamic energy of a lion dance performance during the Lunar New Year festivities! We're in what looks like a festive hallway or event space, and a beautifully adorned white and red lion costume is mid-performance, with its intricate head visible and its body flowing. You can just glimpse the legs of the person inside the costume, adding to the mystery and magic. In the background, a group of people in matching red shirts are gathered, some standing behind a large drum, suggesting they are part of the lively drumming ensemble that always accompanies these dances. On either side of the hallway, there are lovely potted plants overflowing with small, bright orange mandarin or kumquat fruits, which are classic decorations for good luck during this time of year. There's even a single orange on the floor, adding to the sense of an active and joyous celebration. It was so exciting to witness this vibrant and traditional display!
(score=0.30) 2011-04-16 [Enjoying an Urban Meal]: I stopped for a meal today at what looks like a hawker center or street stall, nestled right by a busy urban street. I'm having what seems to be some delicious chicken and rice, served on those classic red plates with matching small bowls for soup or sauce. There's a whole array of condiments right on the table, which I love for customizing my dish. From my spot, I can see a red car parked along the road and even a building in the background labeled 'HONG LIM COMPLEX'. It's a very authentic experience, eating out in the open like this, even with a 'No Smoking' sign paradoxically near a pack of cigarettes on the table! The combination of fresh food and the bustling city backdrop is just perfect for a quick bite.

trace.query: musical instrument in Xi'an mosque Muslim market shop with antiques and souvenirs
trace.snippet:
[Visual analysis of 5 photo(s)]
Based on the photo from 2007-01-06, which depicts a vibrant market setting with antiques and souvenirs, the musical instrument you saw displayed in the shop was a **violin**.

In the image, a light brown, wooden violin is visible, standing upright on the left side, nestled among various items. It has the characteristic shape of a violin, complete with a scroll at the top and f-holes, though no bow is visible with it. The shop also features numerous other items, including stacks of Mahjong tiles in their cases, multiple abacuses (one large dark brown one on the left and a smaller one in the center), beautifully carved wooden pieces, ornate decorative boxes (some red and gold, others green), and sets of what appear to be traditional chess or board game pieces in wooden boxes.

Seeing her so content and joyful, even with everything else going on, is truly a wonderful sight.

photos.caption: Tilly the lamb says "I loves my Mum." Tilly now 12 days old. Yay for survival!

This sweet moment, captured in what looks like a cozy barn, really highlights the beauty of nature and the tender bond between a mother and her offspring.

photos.caption: Sweet Sadie 4 months already!

Seeing her so full of life and laughter during this time, just a couple of days after Nicholas's hospital stay, really brings a lot of warmth and lightness to our recovery journey. It reminds me how important these simple moments of family joy are, especially when dealing with challenges.

photos.caption: Sadie visiting Daddy in hospital.

His arm is all bandaged up, and you can see the hospital wristband and IV. It was a challenging time, but moments like this, with family by his side, really highlight the importance of support during recovery.

photos.caption: The Fix - Husband's arm after surgery
photos.captionKii: Here's another look at my forearm fracture, captured in this X-ray from Ballarat Health Services on July 28th. It gives me a clearer perspective with two different views of the surgical plates and screws meticulously holding my ulna and radius together. Seeing my name, Nicholas McCulloch, printed on the film really personalizes this medical record. It’s a powerful visual reminder of the complex repair work done and my ongoing journey towards full recovery.

photos.caption: I kept telling my husband football was a dangerous pastime...
photos.captionKii: Well, this is certainly a memorable X-ray! It's a stark reminder of the day I fractured my forearm. You can clearly see both the ulna and radius bones were broken, and there's a surgical plate with several screws holding them together now. It really puts into perspective the extent of the injury and the work done to put things back into place. Definitely not an experience I'd want to repeat, but it's part of my journey and recovery.

The 'DO NOT pick up the kangaroos!' warning really stood out, reminding everyone to respect the animals and their space. It's so vital to follow these guidelines for both our safety and theirs. I thought it was a useful reminder of how to behave responsibly when observing these incredible creatures.

It's funny how these small, simple pleasures, like a frozen raspberry drink, can mark a moment, especially on New Year's Day.

It's such a precious moment of pure delight and happiness from that day.

photos.caption: Zoe impersonating the Leaning Tower of Pisa in her new dress.
photos.captionKii: What a sweet moment from our New Year's Eve outing! Here's this adorable child, still rocking that fantastic tiered pink dress, posing with a man in what looks like a shoe store. The child's bouncy curly hair and direct gaze at the camera are just too cute, and the man with his cool sunglasses on his head is smiling subtly, crouching down to be closer to her height. I love how the background is filled with racks of shoes and sandals, hinting at some fun shopping we did that day. It's another lovely memory from celebrating the end of the year with them.

photos.caption: Shadow
photos.captionKii: What a wonderful New Year's Eve outing with my big black dog! He looks so strong and majestic standing in this sunny, dry grassy field, with those beautiful large trees in the background. It looks like he might have just had a swim or played in some water, given how wet his coat is, especially around his chest and legs. He's wearing his chain collar and seems to be looking intently towards something off in the distance. It was such a lovely, clear day to be out exploring with him, and moments like these truly make my heart happy.

photos.caption: Comfy much Shadow puppy?
photos.captionKii: What a peaceful sight of my sweet black dog completely lost in dreams! Here they are, stretched out comfortably across a couple of stylish brown and beige patterned pillows, looking so content on the carpeted floor. Their eyes are gently closed, and they're just soaking up some quiet rest. In the background, I can just make out a wooden cart, adding to the cozy, homey vibe. It's these moments of pure relaxation with my furry family members that truly make a house a home.

photos.caption: Fat Lily and her cartoon look-a-like.
photos.captionKii: What a peaceful sight! My sweet grey and white cat is curled up in a perfect ball, sound asleep on its blue, carpeted perch. It looks so cozy and content, completely lost in dreams, with its white paws tucked in. Above, there's even a charming print of another sleepy cartoon cat lounging on a striped chair, making this little corner a true haven for napping. It's moments like these that truly bring tranquility to our home.

photos.caption: "Mummy draw me a ballerina like Zoe" says Zoe. "Ok, I'll try." Mummy's drawing skills rarely go past stick figures...
photos.captionKii: My daughter's adorable drawing from Christmas Day! She created this sweet little stick figure girl in bright pink, looking so happy with a big smile on her face and her arms raised up high. It looks like she's dancing or doing a yoga 'tree pose,' and I love the curly hair and the simple, charming dress. It's drawn on lined paper, and you can even see a number '4' at the bottom, adding to its unique charm. It's such a joy to see her creativity blossoming, especially on such a special holiday.

photos.caption: Zoe with her other favourite chrissie pressie  - a cash register and fake money so we can play shop!
photos.captionKii: What a sweet moment of quiet play during our Christmas Day! Here's my daughter, completely engrossed in her magnetic learning board, sitting patiently on the floor. She's holding a small card, perhaps practicing her letters or numbers, and looking up at the camera with her big, curious eyes. In the background, you can spot her dollhouse, charmingly decorated with a bit of Christmas garland, reminding me of all the festive cheer around us. It warms my heart to see her so focused and happily exploring her toys indoors on this special holiday.

photos.caption: Belly at almost 27.5 weeks
photos.captionKii: What a beautiful Christmas Day we had outdoors! I captured this triptych, starting with a bright close-up selfie of me smiling in my sunglasses under the clear blue sky in the top left. Then, in the bottom left, you can see my growing baby bump as I stand by the calm water of a pond, enjoying the serene landscape. And in the larger right panel, my sweet daughter is right beside me, both of us looking down, perhaps at something interesting on the ground or just enjoying the quiet moment together in nature. It was lovely to spend the day outside, feeling the sunshine and connecting with my daugh

photos.caption: The Princess in the Paddock  - ping @njmccull
photos.captionKii: What a perfect snapshot of my daughter's joyful Christmas Day! This diptych captures her vibrant energy and pure happiness outdoors. In the bottom left panel, she's absolutely beaming, running freely through a sunny, grassy field in her beautiful, flowing pink dress and orange boots, surrounded by nature and a big blue sky. The top right panel gives us a wonderful close-up of her smiling face, still out in the field, radiating pure delight. And in the bottom right, we see another precious moment by the pond, where she's standing with her dad, who is crouching beside her, probably teaching or g

photos.caption: Hangin' with the dawgs by the dam...
photos.captionKii: What a fun and joyful Christmas Day we had playing outdoors! This diptych captures some of those happy moments under a beautiful blue sky with fluffy white clouds. In the left panel, I'm sharing a moment with our adorable light brown, scruffy dog, both of us looking up towards the camera. And in the right panel, my sweet daughter is peeking over my shoulder, joining me and our black dog for another playful selfie. It looks like the black dog is giving me a loving nuzzle, and I'm just beaming with happiness. So glad we got to spend time with both our furry family members and my daughter on this

photos.caption: One of Zoe's favourite chrissie pressies - a pink "fishing rob."
photos.captionKii: What a precious moment captured on Christmas Day! Here's my sweet daughter, focused intently as she tries her hand at fishing. She's holding her bright pink fishing rod with such determination, and it looks like her dad is right there, guiding her hands and teaching her the ropes. We were out by this calm little pond, surrounded by grass and trees, enjoying the beautiful weather. It warms my heart to see her exploring new activities and spending quality time with her dad during the holidays.

photos.caption: Mummy and Zoe making lots of new friends!
photos.captionKii: What a wonderful day we had at the lake! I took our daughter to feed the birds, and it was so exciting to see so many black swans gather around us. Here I am, holding out some food, and she's right next to me, watching intently as the swans and other ducks and gulls flock to the water's edge. The sun was shining brightly, reflecting off the water, making it a perfect outing to enjoy nature and spend some quality time together. It's such a joy to see her experiencing these moments.

photos.caption: My father in law cannot resist patting Fat Lily and she is not going to argue with that!
photos.captionKii: I captured these sweet moments of our grey and white cat enjoying some serious belly rubs! In the first shot of this diptych, he's just sprawled out on the beige carpet, showing off his fluffy white belly, completely relaxed and upside down. Then, in the second panel, you can see my husband's hand gently stroking his fur. It’s always so heartwarming to see him so content and trusting, especially when he's inviting us to pet his belly like this. These cozy, quiet moments at home are truly the best.

photos.caption: A Christmas Fairy complete with her Daddy
photos.captionKii: What a sweet moment! Here's my husband kneeling down, and our daughter is giving him a lovely hug, leaning in with a big smile. She's absolutely adorable in her little red and green holiday-themed dress, complete with tiny wings and a cute holly decoration in her curly hair. He's got a big smile too, and you can see the effort we put into decorating our Christmas tree glowing behind them. It's so full of festive lights, colorful garlands, and shimmering tinsel. These are the precious family moments that truly make the holiday season special.

photos.caption: Zoe's all ready for Santa!
photos.captionKii: I just love seeing how excited my little one is for Christmas! Here she is, all smiles and giving two enthusiastic thumbs up in her pretty pink dress, standing proudly in front of our beautifully decorated Christmas tree. The tree is sparkling with lights, colorful tinsel, and an assortment of gold and silver ornaments, and you can even spot a golden star. Her joy is truly infectious, and moments like these make all the decorating efforts so worthwhile as we get ready for the holidays.

photos.caption: A concentration of decorations at the bottom of the tree. Wonder who is responsible for that? Could it be you Miss Three? :)
photos.captionKii: Here's another shot of our Christmas tree, and it looks like we're still in the process of getting it just right, or maybe I'm just admiring the handiwork! You can see my hand on the right, adjusting some of the sparkling purple tinsel. The tree is really coming together with all the different colored garlands—the bold red, the deep blue and purple, and shimmering gold tinsel—along with a mix of silver, gold, and pink baubles. I especially like the gold star ornament catching the light. It's so much fun bringing all this festive cheer into the house as we prepare for the holidays.

photos.caption: Finally got around to it...
photos.captionKii: I love seeing our Christmas tree all lit up and beautifully decorated! We put on a mix of colorful tinsel and garlands—red, a lovely deep purple, and shiny gold—along with some pretty pink and silver baubles. It's standing proudly by the window, casting a warm glow in the evening light. It really feels like the holidays are almost here when the tree is finally done, bringing that special festive cheer into our home.

photos.caption: I ❤working from home :-)
photos.captionKii: I captured this tranquil view, looking out from what appears to be under a covered structure, perhaps a porch or veranda. In the foreground, I can see part of a large, light-colored water tank and a corrugated metal wall, framing the scene. Beyond that, a simple fence stretches across the midground, leading my eye to the gently rolling, grassy hills in the distance. Tall, slender trees with sparse foliage are dotted across the landscape under a bright, partly cloudy sky, while a denser, darker green tree stands prominently on the right. It was a peaceful moment, taking in the serene, rural sur

photos.caption: It's not even 8:15am and the nail stylist has already been...
photos.captionKii: What a fun moment with my little one! She was so excited to show off her freshly painted fingernails. We picked out these bright pink and purple colors, alternating them on her tiny fingers. In this double shot, she's playfully peeking over her hands in the first frame and then beaming a big smile, clearly proud of her colorful manicure, in the second. It’s these sweet, simple moments indoors that I love to capture.

photos.caption: Not a poser at all...
photos.captionKii: What a delightful moment during our day out! I captured this adorable young girl, dressed up as a princess with a sparkling crown and a beautiful pink and rainbow-colored tulle dress, as she happily explored the sunny outdoor area. She's holding a tiny yellow flower, her face beaming with joy, which perfectly encapsulates the carefree spirit of the day. The grassy field, distant trees, and rustic fences in the background set a lovely scene for her imaginative play.

photos.caption: Making friends with the local wildlife
photos.captionKii: I was so captivated by this beautiful black swan during my day out in Ballarat! It came right up to me, looking directly into the camera with its striking black feathers and vibrant red beak. In the background, I could see even more black swans, along with ducks and gulls, all enjoying the sunny park. The lush green grass and distant trees, with glimpses of a playground and cars, really capture the serene yet lively atmosphere of the day.

photos.caption: Seagulls and swans at Lake Wendouree
photos.captionKii: I loved capturing this serene view during my visit to Ballarat today! The lake was teeming with a variety of waterfowl, with numerous ducks, swans, and gulls enjoying the water and resting along the muddy shore. In the distance, I could see a small island covered in green vegetation, adding to the natural beauty of the scene. My Instaweather app overlay confirms it was a lovely and warm 27 degrees with partly cloudy skies, making for a perfect day to enjoy the outdoors and observe the local wildlife.

photos.caption: It's a floppy red hat kinda day
photos.captionKii: I'm loving this bright, sunny day! I snapped this selfie while enjoying the outdoors, trying to keep cool and protected from the sun with my big, stylish red sun hat and dark sunglasses. You can still see my nose piercing peeking out! It was such a beautiful day to be outside, with green foliage in the background, making for a perfectly relaxed moment.

photos.caption: Don't forget to stop and smell the flowers Darby!
photos.captionKii: I absolutely adore this moment I captured today with my sweet dog! He's looking up at me with such a happy, eager expression, his tongue slightly out, as I offer him a yellow, spiky object—perhaps a favorite toy or a treat. His beautiful golden-brown fur looks a little muddy around his chest and legs, suggesting we've been having some fun exploring or playing outdoors. The warm sunlight on his fur and the grassy ground makes for such a lovely memory of our time together.

photos.caption: First BBQ at our new place.
photos.captionKii: I loved capturing this lively moment of our family enjoying a backyard barbecue! The split image gives two perspectives: on the left, a man is busy at the grill, getting sausages and other food ready, with a brick wall serving as the backdrop. On the right, our two adorable children are happily standing at the table, which is covered in a lovely blue and green floral tablecloth, with their individual meals and drinks laid out. They're both smiling brightly at the camera, clearly enjoying the outdoor meal and the festive atmosphere. It's such a warm and fun scene, surrounded by trees and a back

photos.caption: Mummy and Zoe on "Zoe's Hill."
photos.captionKii: I loved this moment capturing a fun outing with the little one and our furry friend today! We're all posing cheerfully in an open, grassy field, with our arms raised in excitement against an overcast sky. The little one looks adorable in red pants and bright pink rain boots, while our lovely golden-brown dog stands patiently beside us on the earthy ground. It was a wonderful day enjoying the fresh air and wide-open spaces of the countryside together.

photos.caption: The back corner of our property. Wonder what stories that tree has to tell...
photos.captionKii: I captured this striking split-image today, which really highlights the contrasts in the landscape I observed. On the left, a magnificent, gnarled old tree stands starkly against a dramatic, cloudy sky, its bare branches reaching out. Below it, the ground is green, and I can just make out some distant features like possibly sheep or structures. The right side offers a different view: a lush, vibrant green field stretching out, with a rustic fence line guiding the eye towards distant trees and what looks like a farmhouse under a somewhat brighter sky. The distinct yellow line dividing the two h

photos.caption: The move has just all been a bit too much forums Asia. She'd just like to hideaway for a while now.
photos.captionKii: I captured this incredibly cozy moment of my tabby cat fast asleep on our striped bed. They're all curled up, with their paw adorably covering their face, almost like they're trying to block out the light or just enjoying a super deep nap. The bedspread, with its lovely blue, pink, and white stripes, makes for such a peaceful backdrop. It's just so sweet to see them so utterly relaxed and comfortable.

photos.caption: Well I'm actually in Doreen, but hey close enough. #weather #instaweather #outdoors #australia
photos.captionKii: I snapped this photo today, marking my presence in Mernda on a wonderfully sunny 35°C day! The clear sky was perfect for capturing this colorful outdoor play area, complete with various plastic structures like a small house and climbing elements, all set on a bed of gravel. It's fantastic to see such vibrant play equipment, perhaps for a child to enjoy, under such brilliant weather conditions. The InstaWeatherPro app captured all the details of the beautiful morning here.

photos.caption: My beautiful bunnies in their cool bathroom hideout in preparation for the stupidly hot day we are having here today.
photos.captionKii: What a peaceful scene with my adorable bunnies! I caught them just relaxing in their space today. My brown rabbit is nestled comfortably in their hay-filled bin, looking so content. Meanwhile, my white and orange spotted bunny is taking it easy on the blue mat with the cool anchor design, right next to a green pet carrier. It's so lovely to see them both just chilling out, making themselves completely at home in their corner of the house.

photos.caption: Traversing the rocks in a princess dress and converse sneakers. Purple ones with black laces no less. "I climb on the rocks Mummy, I no go home!"
photos.captionKii: What a beautiful day for some outdoor exploration! I captured this precious moment of my child making their way carefully over some rocks amidst tall, sun-kissed grass. They're wearing a vibrant pink top and flowy multi-colored pants, perfectly suited for a sunny adventure. The light was just incredible, creating a beautiful flare on the right side of the frame, giving everything a warm glow. It's so lovely to see them engaged in discovery, just enjoying nature and moving with such focused determination.

photos.caption: Packing packing packing - today it's the kitchen's turn. Such joy.
photos.captionKii: I captured this impressive stack of cardboard boxes today, clearly indicating a busy moment with deliveries or home organization. Many of the boxes are from Avon, featuring branding related to their Breast Cancer Crusade and Anew Genics skincare products. There's also a box from 'Gabriel Gaté' visible at the bottom. It looks like I've either just received a large shipment or I'm getting things ready to be sent out, highlighting a productive, albeit box-filled, day.

photos.caption: I have been informed that I may need to find somewhere else to sleep...
photos.captionKii: What a perfectly cozy morning! I captured this sweet scene of my partner relaxing in bed, completely engrossed in their phone, while our three lovely cats have made themselves right at home. It's so typical to find them lounging around like this – one fluffy white cat looking up, another grey and white one stretched out so comfortably in the foreground, and the tabby curled up near the red pillows. Our bed with its striped sheets seems to be the favorite hangout spot for everyone. Moments like these, just being home with my family and our pets, are truly precious.

photos.caption: A new chapter begins for The McCullochs...
photos.captionKii: I spotted this 'For Lease' sign today in front of a modern suburban house. It's a typical design with brick on the lower half and what looks like siding on the upper portion, along with a tiled roof. The front yard has some fresh landscaping with mulch and small plants, and I can see the garage door slightly open, revealing some items inside. It looks like a quiet neighborhood, and I paused to take this picture, thinking about the possibilities this could represent.

photos.caption: Gotta love toddler tea time - fish and chips with sauce on paper :-)
photos.captionKii: I caught a lively moment today with the kids having a snack or casual meal at the dining table. There are three little ones, completely focused on their food, which looks like some kind of cookies or biscuits, spread out on a white paper. The girl in the middle looks especially cute with her tiara, wearing a pink dress over a green top as she takes a bite. The two boys on either side are also busy munching away. It's a bit messy, with crumbs everywhere, but that just shows they're enjoying themselves! In the background, I can see our cat tree and some of the living room, making it a familiar a

photos.caption: Lily puss - another of my special purring furries :-)
photos.captionKii: I captured such a sweet, relaxed moment today with one of my cats. This lovely furball, with its distinct grey and white fur and striking amber eyes, is just chilling out, lying comfortably on what looks like a floral patterned cushion. They're looking right at me, and I just love how calm and cozy they seem. It's nice to have these peaceful pet moments captured.

photos.caption: A new way to eat chicken nuggets and chips...
photos.captionKii: I caught a sweet moment today of the little one, so intently focused on trying to use chopsticks! They're attempting to pick up the chicken nuggets from their meal, with a side of fries, which is just adorable. We seem to be out somewhere casual, like a food court, judging by the white table and their colorful stroller visible in the background. It's wonderful to see them learning and engaging with new skills, even something as simple as mastering utensils.

photos.caption: Asia and Theo, two of my special purring furries :)
photos.captionKii: I put together a sweet diptych today, featuring a couple of my feline friends. On the left, my brown tabby cat is relaxing on a light-colored surface, possibly a bed or couch. They're looking straight at the camera with their striking green eyes, giving a calm and slightly serious gaze. On the right, there's another cat, mostly white with dark tabby markings on its head and a few spots on its body. This one has bright yellow-green eyes and its ears are perked up, looking intently off to the side. It's nice to capture both of them, showing off their distinct personalities and beautiful features

photos.caption: Mummy don't distract me with silly pictures when I  concentrating on The Wiggles. Puh-lease!
photos.captionKii: I captured some sweet moments of this little one today. They're sitting comfortably, likely on the couch, showing off their adorable curly hair and bright blue eyes. They're wearing a fun outfit: a simple grey t-shirt underneath a very vibrant, multi-layered pink, purple, and orange dress or tutu, which adds such a playful pop of color. The diptych shows them first in profile, looking thoughtfully away, and then directly at the camera with a wonderfully curious or serious gaze. It's nice to see them just relaxing at home, with the familiar bookshelf and other bits of daily life visible in the

photos.caption: Cinder puss
photos.captionKii: I caught a really sweet close-up of my cat today. Their light orange and cream-colored fur looks so soft, and those bright green eyes are just stunning and a little intense in this light. You can tell they're a bit serious, just looking ahead. It looks like they might be sitting on my desk or nearby, with some office electronics in the blurred background. I just love their unique and piercing gaze in this photo.

photos.caption: Toddler (and Mummy)Tea Time - Zoe rubs her tummy and says "oh yum!"
photos.captionKii: It looks like we were having a fun and casual snack time or meal. I set out a spread of different things in bowls: some chopped sausage, diced tomatoes, and cubes of cheese. There were also plenty of fresh green grapes, and I captured a little hand reaching in for some! We had a couple of dips too, along with some crispy breadsticks on that green, leaf-shaped plate in the background. It was nice to have a variety of tasty bites to pick at for a relaxed evening.

photos.caption: Kids training to be Jedis at Disneyland. Darth Vader showed up and they fought him on stage one by one. It was very cool.
photos.captionKii: What a fun surprise at Disneyland! I got to see the Jedi Training Academy, where a whole group of kids, dressed in their little Jedi robes, were enthusiastically training with lightsabers. It was so cool to see them on stage, following along with the instructors, ready to defend the galaxy. The Star Wars sign in the background really brought it all together, adding another layer of magic to my visit.

photos.caption: Catching up on a pic or two from the weekend - Disneyland!
photos.captionKii: I finally made it to Disneyland! It was so exciting to see Sleeping Beauty Castle standing grandly against the slightly overcast sky. There were so many people bustling around, all eager to experience the magic, just like me. It felt incredible to be right there in front of such an iconic landmark, ready for a day of fun and wonder at the park.

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I captured this shot of the iconic Hard Rock Cafe sign glowing brightly against the night sky. The vivid red neon letters of 'Hard Rock Cafe' really stand out, with its classic circular logo, creating a quintessential Hollywood nightlife vibe. Below the main sign, there's a dynamic, colorful LED screen displaying an array of shifting patterns and colors, adding to the lively atmosphere of the street. It was cool to see such a famous landmark lit up at night, perfectly encapsulating the energetic and glamorous feel of Hollywood after dark.

photos.caption: I got so famous they even made a separate entrance for me!
photos.captionKii: During my Hollywood adventure, I spotted this red awning proudly displaying 'W TALENT ENTRANCE.' It was intriguing to see a sign like this, hinting at the behind-the-scenes world of entertainment. The white letters on the bright red really stood out, leading to a gated entry that felt exclusive and full of potential. It was another cool detail that reminded me I was right in the heart of where movie magic happens.

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: During my Hollywood adventure, I was so excited to find Big Bird's star on the Walk of Fame! It's such an iconic part of visiting Hollywood, and seeing the name of such a beloved character from Sesame Street there, with the little television symbol, was just a really fun and nostalgic moment. It added another layer of whimsy to my exploration of the famous street.

photos.caption: Some of the colourful locals on Hollywood Boulevard
photos.captionKii: I captured this lively collage of Hollywood street performers during my night out. In the top frame, I saw two enthusiastic Elvis impersonators, one in a classic black sequined jumpsuit and the other in a dazzling gold jacket, striking poses with a woman elegantly dressed as Marilyn Monroe. The energy they brought to the sidewalk was infectious. In the bottom left, I spotted Spider-Man, crouching in a classic pose by a lamppost, looking ready for action. And on the bottom right, I was intrigued by someone in a fantastic red demonic costume with wings, adding another layer of unique character t

photos.caption: The Chinese Theatre in Hollywood
photos.captionKii: I captured this impressive view of the iconic TCL Chinese Theatre, beautifully illuminated against the dark night sky. The distinctive pagoda-style roof and the grand, ornate entrance with its intricate carvings and red accents really stand out. It felt incredible to see such a legendary landmark, known for countless movie premieres, especially at night when its architecture is dramatically lit, adding to the magical atmosphere of my Hollywood adventure.

photos.caption: Do as you are told...
photos.captionKii: While exploring the streets, I spotted these two intriguing posters stuck on a rough, textured wall. They both declared 'STAY WEIRD AND PAINT SHIT' in bold white letters. One was bright red, and the other was a deep blue, adding a cool pop of color to the grimy wall. I found it especially amusing that beneath the edgy message, there was a stylized logo that looked like it said 'Disney' – a cheeky juxtaposition of corporate branding with a rebellious artistic statement. It really captured some of the unique, quirky street art you come across in urban areas, adding to the atmosphere of my trip.

photos.caption: Me and my red glasses ready for StoryWorld!
photos.captionKii: I took this close-up self-portrait today, looking directly at the camera with a gentle smile. My short, wavy blonde hair frames my face, and I'm wearing my favorite red glasses. I'm also sporting a subtle red lipstick that complements the glasses, and my blue and black striped top. I wanted to capture this moment, feeling good about my look during this trip.

photos.caption: I'm on screens everywhere - that's just what happens when you're famous.
photos.captionKii: Today, while I was exploring Madame Tussauds, I noticed these cool interactive screens. The one on the left showed a figure on a red carpet, surrounded by what looked like paparazzi, with a scenic backdrop of mountains and a blue sky – it really captured the essence of a glamorous Hollywood premiere! On the right, the same figure was posing with the iconic Hollywood sign prominently in the background. Both screens were clearly branded with 'Madame Tussauds Hollywood,' which reminded me of all the fun I was having exploring the museum and seeing these celebrity figures up close. It was neat to

photos.caption: If only my Miss very-nearly 3 could see this display!
photos.captionKii: I stumbled upon such a fun and sparkly display today while I was out and about! This wall was absolutely covered in an array of crowns and tiaras, each one more glittery and colorful than the last. There are all sorts of designs – some with big gemstones, some with fluffy pink feathers, and others with playful ribbons. I can see a couple of tiaras with 'Birthday Girl' packaging below, which really adds to the whimsical, celebratory vibe. It was such a cheerful and unexpected sight to come across, filled with so much sparkle and potential for imaginative play.

photos.caption: And Jim says "Step this way to see Jess McCulloch- she's amazing!" :)
photos.captionKii: I had such a fun time today encountering this lively wax figure! He's got a big, open-mouthed smile and is pointing outwards with both hands, almost like he's inviting you into the scene. He's dressed smartly in a pinstriped suit jacket over a striped button-up shirt, looking quite dapper. In the background, I could see other people exploring, some with cameras, which tells me I was probably at a wax museum or a similar attraction. It was such a lighthearted moment to capture amidst all the interesting things I was seeing, and I loved the playful energy of the figure.

photos.caption: Alfred takes me seriously...
photos.captionKii: I couldn't resist grabbing a selfie with the master of suspense himself, Alfred Hitchcock, during my visit to the wax museum today! I'm looking straight at the camera, my red glasses on, next to his very recognizable profile. He's dressed in his classic black suit and tie, and his intense gaze is just as iconic in wax as it was in his films. It was such a fun and memorable moment to 'meet' him and capture this unique snapshot amidst all the other fascinating figures.

photos.caption: I agree
photos.captionKii: I spotted this 'Pretzel Dogs' sign today, advertising a 'Half Hot Dog, Half Pretzel!' from Auntie Anne's. The sign itself is pretty eye-catching with its bold red and orange stripes and a carnival-style marquee at the top, along with cheerful pointing hands. It really captures that quirky, fun vibe you find in commercial areas. It made me smile to see such a 'craaazy!!!' combination, and it’s definitely one of those unique things you notice when you're out exploring.

photos.caption: Nice colours
photos.captionKii: I was so captivated by these gorgeous mosaic-topped tables today! There are three of them, lined up, each with its own unique and vibrant symmetrical pattern. The intricate tile work, with all the greens, reds, blues, and yellows, is just stunning. They look like outdoor cafe tables, probably on a sunny patio or sidewalk somewhere. I loved how the light really brought out the colors and textures of the tiles. It was such a cheerful and artistic sight to come across while I was out and about, a truly delightful detail in the urban landscape.

photos.caption: Made out of guitar picks.. Very impressive
photos.captionKii: I came across such an incredible piece of art today – a huge mosaic of what looks like Jimi Hendrix, all made entirely from guitar picks! The way the white picks form his face, contrasting with the vibrant medley of purple, blue, pink, red, and green picks making up his iconic hair, is just brilliant. You can see the individual picks up close, each one adding to the texture and detail of the portrait. It’s truly a unique and creative sight, and I loved finding something so artistic and unexpected while I was exploring.

photos.caption: Would it be weird to be in Hollywood and NOT go and see movie star homes? Ick.
photos.captionKii: I couldn't help but notice this classic 'Original Updated Movie Star Maps Sold Here' sign today. It's such an iconic, almost kitschy, part of the Hollywood experience, and it always makes me smile to see one. The vibrant blue and yellow posters really pop against the dark utility box. In the background, I can see a bright, sunny street scene with palm trees and buildings, clearly capturing the lively atmosphere of being out and about in an urban environment where these maps are a staple.

photos.caption: Zoe waves hi to mummy on FaceTime
photos.captionKii: I love this screenshot from our video call! It always makes me smile to see my little one's happy, laughing face filling the screen. They're so full of energy, with their curly hair and that big grin, and it looks like they might even be waving or playing with their hands. In the background, I can see the familiar bookshelf and some things on the wall. And there I am in the corner, smiling too, clearly enjoying every moment of our chat. It’s such a healthy and visually appealing mix, perfect for a light meal or a sweet, wholesome snack during my explorations in Perth. I definitely appreciate finding such fresh options!

On the side, a small bowl of savory sautéed mushrooms completed the meal. It was such a satisfying and beautifully presented dish, a delightful culinary discovery as I continue to explore the local food scene here.

photos.caption: Any restaurant that has dogs wandering about gets my vote!!!

It's these unexpected, warm encounters that really add to the charm of exploring a new place and settling into life in Perth.

The warm wooden table setting and the glimpse of another person's presence suggest a lovely, shared dining experience as part of my early explorations in Perth.

photos.caption: Read carefully...

And the 'White Monster' sounds intriguing with its 'fragrant perfume from the Gods.' It's these little details in new places that really catch my eye and make the experience of settling in so enjoyable, especially after encountering that thought-provoking sign about wine earlier.

The cafe had a warm, inviting feel with its classic wooden chairs and tables, and seeing the table number '33' on the stand felt like a small, personal marker of finally being able to relax and take in my new surroundings after all the journey's hustle.

These small, functional details truly define the airport experience as I get closer to boarding.

Above the board, I noticed the windows revealing a quiet lounge area where some people were resting, a stark contrast to the energy down below. It really captured the dynamic atmosphere of a busy travel day.

I remember looking up at this truly impressive stone monument, the sunlight making all the intricate details pop against the brilliant blue sky. The way the light played on the textured stone really highlighted the craftsmanship, making it feel like a timeless piece of art and history that I was lucky to encounter on such a clear day.

They just burst with color, all those spiky, vibrant red blossoms clustered together, creating such a beautiful, fluffy display against the deep green leaves. I remember noticing how unique their shape was, almost like little fireworks. And if you look closely, you can even spot a few tiny insects, maybe bees, buzzing around, enjoying the nectar. It was such a lovely moment to pause and appreciate the intricate beauty of nature during my day.

photos.caption: Daddy's a tiger - run Zoe run!

We were out enjoying the open grassy area, and it was such a joy to see them explore and have so much fun in the fresh air. It truly captures their playful spirit and a lovely family moment outdoors.

photos.caption: New family member at the McCulloch Pet Retreat :)

I remember making sure they had plenty of fresh greens, and there's their metal bowl filled with crisp celery, ready for a snack. It's such a peaceful sight, watching them enjoy their comfortable little home.

photos.caption: Zoe and the dogs

We were by this lovely body of water, with the calm surface stretching out, and the whole scene just felt so peaceful and full of life. It was such a joy to watch them explore and enjoy the fresh air during our walk.

photos.caption: The little family

I remember seeing all the wild grasses and reeds growing in the water, adding so much texture to the foreground. It was such a peaceful moment, just standing there and taking in the quiet beauty of nature as the day transitioned.

The calm water, reflecting the surrounding lush green foliage and the soft, white wall in the background, created such a peaceful atmosphere. I loved how the gnarled branches of a tree reached out, adding to the garden's artistry, and the scattered white blooms brought a delicate touch of color. It was a lovely contrast to the bustling city streets I'd been exploring, offering a moment of tranquility and natural beauty during my visit.

photos.caption: Suzhou, China — School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: I remember this candid moment I captured while exploring a market area in Suzhou. This man was casually perched, squatting on a stone pillar or block at what looked like an entrance to a bustling, covered market street. He was wearing a light-colored shirt and dark pants, and he seemed to be taking a break, perhaps holding a small object like a cigarette, as he looked towards me. The background reveals the depth of the market, with various stalls and goods under dark awnings. It was another one of those everyday scenes that gave me a real feel for the local life and atmosphere of the city, sho

photos.caption: Suzhou, China — School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: I remember walking along and coming across this inviting arched entrance, leading into what looked like a vibrant local market or a bustling, covered street in Suzhou. The white wall and dark roofline gave it a traditional feel, but beyond it, I could see a hive of activity with stalls displaying various goods under blue tarpaulins. Part of my companion is visible on the right, perhaps also taking in the scene. It felt like a gateway into the everyday life of the city, a place where locals would shop and gather, and I was eager to step inside and explore what treasures and sights awaited me. I

photos.caption: Suzhou, China — School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: I remember stumbling upon this lovely, authentic scene while exploring Suzhou. Three older men were deeply engrossed in a game of cards at a stone table, likely in a local park or garden. The ground was visibly wet from recent rain, but that didn't deter them from their game. The man on the left, wearing a cap and a blue jacket, seemed to be mid-gesture, perhaps explaining a move or reacting to the game. The others were focused on their hands, surrounded by the tranquil greenery and decorative rocks of the garden. It was such a genuine glimpse into daily life, a peaceful moment amidst my city

photos.caption: Suzhou, China — School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: I remember coming across this package of 'Mennear HEALTH GENTLEMAN SOCKS' while exploring Suzhou. The English translation on the packaging really caught my eye, adding a touch of humor and curiosity to the everyday items I was seeing. The design features a pair of legs in dark trousers and dress shoes, which is quite typical for socks, but the branding and clear plastic wrap made it feel like a unique souvenir or just an interesting cultural observation from my time there.

photos.caption: Suzhou, China — School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this large, modern-looking building, the Suzhou Center for Disease Prevention and Control, with its name clearly displayed in both Chinese and English, along with the CPC logo. It's interesting how it stands out against the overcast sky. I also captured some green trees at the bottom and a bit of a traffic light on the side, just a quick snapshot of the urban landscape while I was exploring the city.

photos.caption: Suzhou, China — School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: I remember coming across this small, informal shop or kiosk tucked away on a somewhat damp street in Suzhou. It looked like a local convenience spot, with various packaged goods, snacks, and drinks visible behind the glass counter, inviting passersby to stop for a quick purchase. To the left, there's a significant pile of rubble and debris, suggesting ongoing construction or demolition nearby, which was a common sight as the city evolved. The wet ground beneath my feet hints at recent rain or just generally damp conditions, adding to the real, unvarnished feel of this everyday urban scene I wa

photos.caption: Suzhou, China — School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this bustling, informal market stall, likely somewhere in Suzhou. Under a simple white tarp, a vendor is displaying a variety of fresh produce like bright red tomatoes, green cucumbers, and carrots. A person in a blue jacket, back turned to the camera, is looking at the goods, probably deciding what to buy. What struck me was the contrast of the fresh market items against the backdrop of a large pile of rubble and debris, which seemed to be a common sight in parts of the city as it developed. It gave me a real sense of the everyday life and rapid changes happening around me a

photos.caption: Suzhou, China — School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: I remember this lively street scene, likely a market, on what seems to be a rainy day in Suzhou. The ground is visibly wet, reflecting the colorful umbrellas that many people are using as they navigate the bustling area. There are several market stalls with their own large, striped umbrellas, displaying goods. I also noticed someone on a scooter, completely covered in a blue poncho, pushing through the crowd. It truly captures the vibrant, everyday life and atmosphere of the city, even with the grey skies and wet streets, as I was exploring.

photos.caption:
Suzhou, China — School Trip 2006

School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: This image captures another incredible view from our trip, showing a beautiful, multi-tiered pagoda peeking out from behind a dense canopy of lush green trees. It looks like the weather was a bit overcast, with a hazy sky, and I can spot a few people down below holding umbrellas, which suggests it might have been raining lightly or just a very sunny day needing protection. The architecture of the pagoda is really striking with its detailed layers, and it felt so serene and ancient. It was a truly memorable part of exploring this historic area.

photos.caption:
Nanjing, China — School Trip 2006

School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: I remember this heartwarming moment posing with two lovely women in what looks like a public park in Suzhou. The older lady in the middle, wearing a green polo, has such a genuinely happy and open smile, holding her walking stick. The woman to her left (my right) in the patterned top is also beaming, and I'm on the far right, smiling back at the camera with my water bottle in hand and sunglasses on my head. It was a beautiful, relaxed day, with other people in the background enjoying the park too, and it really felt like a sweet connection made during my time exploring the city.

photos.caption: Nanjing, China — School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing these large, chunky frogs packed together in a glass tank filled with shallow water. There were so many of them, a mix of greens and browns, just sitting there. You can also spot some white plastic bags floating with them, which made me wonder if they were for cooling or something else. It looked like a fascinating display in a market or perhaps a restaurant, giving me a glimpse into local food customs.

photos.caption: Nanjing, China — School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: Here's my friend, caught in the act of capturing the impressive surroundings with his camera. He's wearing a striped shirt and that red hat, standing on the paved area, framed by the neatly trimmed green bushes. To the right, you can see a large, sturdy part of the monument's stone structure. It was great to share the experience of exploring this grand place with him, and we both seemed to be busy taking lots of photos.

photos.caption: Nanjing, China — School Trip 2006
photos.captionKii: This wide shot really captures the impressive scale of the monument we were visiting, with all those sprawling stairs leading down to the distinctive blue-roofed building nestled among the dense trees. You can see so many people milling about, making their way down or up, and in the distance, the city stretches out under what looks like a hazy sky. It was quite an experience to take in such a grand view from up high, looking out over everything. The man in the light shirt in the foreground on the left also seems to be enjoying the scenery.
